A Note From Us

"Every child is a gift from God — a reminder of His grace."

With immense joy and gratitude, we invite you to be part of this sacred milestone in Elias's life. The sacrament of Baptism marks the beginning of his journey of faith, and your presence and blessings will make this day truly special.

We look forward to celebrating this beautiful blessing with you, our dearest family and friends.

With love & blessings,
Thomas, Maria & Baby Elias 🕊️
